name: HR Policy Engine
problem: HR teams manually check leave policy eligibility.
story: Employee eligible for parental leave after tenure and hours requirements met.

rules: IF TenureEligible(x) AND HoursEligible(x) THEN ParentalLeaveEligible(x)

default.label: Parental leave eligible
